mapper.select: SELECT id, subcontract_no, line_seq, TO_CHAR(subcontract_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS subcontract_date, subcontract_type, subcontractor_cd, subcontractor_nm, order_no, site_nm, location, material_cd, material_nm, product_type, thickness, order_qty, unit, area_m2, area_pyeong, unit_price, total_amount, TO_CHAR(requested_receipt_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS requested_receipt_date, TO_CHAR(actual_receipt_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS actual_receipt_date, TO_CHAR(receipt_changed_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS receipt_changed_date, receipt_location, completed_qty, subcontract_status, remarks FROM subcontract_order ORDER BY subcontract_date DESC, subcontract_no, line_seq
